content.json:
# AI Cost Observatory v5 â€” Unified Cost & Usage Analytics
---
> **No APIM or App Insights required.** All data sourced from Log Analytics:
> - `AICostData_CL` â€” actual billed costs from Azure Cost Management (run `ingest-cost-data.ps1` to refresh)
> - `AzureDiagnostics` â€” per-request logs from Cognitive Services diagnostic settings
> - Token counts from **actual consumed quantity** reported by Azure Cost Management (no price derivation needed)
>
> **Prerequisites:**
> 1. [Diagnostic settings](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/ai-services/diagnostic-logging) sending **RequestResponse** logs to your LAW
> 2. Cost ingestion script run at least once: `./scripts/ingest-cost-data.ps1`

parameters.name: LogAnalyticsWorkspace
parameters.label: Log Analytics Workspace
parameters.query:
Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| project id, name, subscriptionId, resourceGroup

content.json:
## Overview
> **Value:** Single-glance health check answering “how much are we spending, how fast, and how efficiently?”
>
> Tracks total billed cost, daily burn rate, projected monthly spend, token volume, request count, and efficiency (avg tokens per request).

content.title: KPI Summary

content.json:
---
## 💰 Cost per Model
> **Value:** Identifies your most expensive models and whether cost is driven by input (prompts) or output (completions).
>
> Answers: “Which model is eating my budget?” “Should I optimize prompts or switch models?”
>
> Source: AICostData_CL — actual billed USD from Azure Cost Management

content.query:
let CostData = AICostData_CL | where ChargePeriodStart >= {TimeRange:start} and ChargePeriodStart <= {TimeRange:end} | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ChargePeriodStart, Model, Direction, FoundryResource, Project;
CostData
| summarize
    InputCost = round(sumif(BilledCost, Direction == 'Input'), 6),
    OutputCost = round(sumif(BilledCost, Direction == 'Output'), 6),
    PricingUnit = take_any(UnitOfMeasure)
  by Model
| extend TotalCost = round(InputCost + OutputCost, 6)
| extend InputPct = iff(TotalCost > 0, round(InputCost * 100 / TotalCost, 0), 0.0)
| extend OutputPct = iff(TotalCost > 0, round(OutputCost * 100 / TotalCost, 0), 0.0)
| project Model,
    ['Input Cost ($)'] = InputCost,
    ['Output Cost ($)'] = OutputCost,
    ['Total Cost ($)'] = TotalCost,
    ['Input %'] = InputPct,
    ['Output %'] = OutputPct,
    ['Pricing Unit'] = PricingUnit
| order by ['Total Cost ($)'] desc
content.title: Cost Breakdown by Model

content.query:
let CostData = AICostData_CL | where ChargePeriodStart >= {TimeRange:start} and ChargePeriodStart <= {TimeRange:end} | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ChargePeriodStart, Model, Direction, FoundryResource, Project;
CostData
| summarize Cost = round(sum(BilledCost), 4) by Model
| render piechart
content.title: Cost Share by Model

content.json:
---
## 🔢 Token Usage per Model
> **Value:** Reveals token economics — are you paying more per token than published rates? Are prompts bloated relative to completions?
>
> Answers: “What is my effective cost per 1K tokens?” “Is my input ratio healthy?”
>
> Source: AICostData_CL — actual consumed quantity from Cost Management. UnitCost = effective price per billing unit.

content.query:
let CostData = AICostData_CL | where ChargePeriodStart >= {TimeRange:start} and ChargePeriodStart <= {TimeRange:end} | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ChargePeriodStart, Model, Direction, FoundryResource, Project;
CostData
| summarize
    InputTokens = round(sumif(ConsumedQuantity, Direction == 'Input'), 0),
    OutputTokens = round(sumif(ConsumedQuantity, Direction == 'Output'), 0),
    InputCost = round(sumif(BilledCost, Direction == 'Input'), 6),
    OutputCost = round(sumif(BilledCost, Direction == 'Output'), 6),
    AvgUnitCost = round(avg(UnitCost), 6),
    PricingUnit = take_any(UnitOfMeasure)
  by Model
| extend TotalTokens = InputTokens + OutputTokens
| extend TotalCost = round(InputCost + OutputCost, 6)
| extend InputRatio = iff(TotalTokens > 0, round(InputTokens * 100 / TotalTokens, 1), 0.0)
| extend UnitMultiplier = case(
    PricingUnit == '1M', 1000000.0,
    PricingUnit == '1K', 1000.0,
    PricingUnit == '10K', 10000.0,
    1.0)
| extend EffectiveRate = iff(TotalTokens > 0, round(TotalCost / TotalTokens * UnitMultiplier, 4), 0.0)
| project Model,
    ['Input Tokens'] = tolong(InputTokens),
    ['Output Tokens'] = tolong(OutputTokens),
    ['Total Tokens'] = tolong(TotalTokens),
    ['Total Cost ($)'] = TotalCost,
    ['Input %'] = InputRatio,
    ['Effective $/Unit'] = EffectiveRate,
    ['Pricing Unit'] = PricingUnit,
    ['Avg Unit Cost'] = AvgUnitCost
| order by ['Total Cost ($)'] desc
content.title: Token Usage by Model (Actual Consumed Quantity)

content.query:
let CostData = AICostData_CL | where ChargePeriodStart >= {TimeRange:start} and ChargePeriodStart <= {TimeRange:end} | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ChargePeriodStart, Model, Direction, FoundryResource, Project;
CostData
| summarize Tokens = round(sum(ConsumedQuantity), 0) by Model, Direction
| render barchart
content.title: Input vs Output Tokens by Model

content.json:
---
## 🏢 Foundry Account → Project Drill-Down
> **Value:** Multi-account command center. See cost distribution across all Foundry accounts, then drill into any account to see per-project cost and token breakdown.
>
> Answers: “Which account is the biggest spender?” “Within that account, which project drives cost?”
>
> Click a row to drill down. Data source: AICostData_CL (Project mapped via ingestion script).

content.query:
let CostData = AICostData_CL
| where isnotempty(FoundryResource)
| where ChargePeriodStart >= {TimeRange:start} and ChargePeriodStart <= {TimeRange:end}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ChargePeriodStart, Model, Direction, FoundryResource;
CostData
| summarize
    TotalCost = round(sum(BilledCost), 4),
    TotalTokens = round(sum(ConsumedQuantity), 0),
    Models = dcount(Model),
    Projects = dcount(Project)
  by FoundryResource
| extend TokensK = round((TotalTokens * 1.0) / 1000, 1)
| project FoundryAccount = FoundryResource,
    TotalCost,
    TokensK,
    Models,
    Projects
| order by TotalCost desc
content.title: Foundry Accounts — Click a row to drill down

content.query:
let CostData = AICostData_CL
| where isnotempty(FoundryResource)
| where ChargePeriodStart >= {TimeRange:start} and ChargePeriodStart <= {TimeRange:end}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ChargePeriodStart, Model, Direction, FoundryResource;
CostData
| summarize Cost = round(sum(BilledCost), 4) by FoundryResource
| render piechart
content.title: Cost Share by Foundry Account

content.json:
### 🔍 Projects in **{SelectedFoundryAccount}**
> **Value:** Per-project breakdown within the selected account — pinpoints exactly which workload to optimize.
>
> Shows cost, tokens, input/output split, and model usage per project.

content.query:
let CostData = AICostData_CL
| where isnotempty(FoundryResource)
| where ChargePeriodStart >= {TimeRange:start} and ChargePeriodStart <= {TimeRange:end}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ChargePeriodStart, Model, Direction, FoundryResource;
CostData
| where FoundryResource == "{SelectedFoundryAccount}"
| summarize
    TotalCost = round(sum(BilledCost), 4),
    TotalTokens = round(sum(ConsumedQuantity), 0),
    InputTokens = round(sumif(ConsumedQuantity, Direction == "Input"), 0),
    OutputTokens = round(sumif(ConsumedQuantity, Direction == "Output"), 0),
    Models = dcount(Model)
  by Project
| extend TokensK = round((TotalTokens * 1.0) / 1000, 1)
| extend InputPct = iff(TotalTokens > 0, round((InputTokens * 100.0) / (TotalTokens * 1.0), 1), 0.0)
| project Project,
    TotalCost,
    TokensK,
    InputTokens = tolong(InputTokens),
    OutputTokens = tolong(OutputTokens),
    InputPct,
    Models
| order by TotalCost desc
content.title: Projects in {SelectedFoundryAccount}

content.query:
let CostData = AICostData_CL
| where isnotempty(FoundryResource)
| where ChargePeriodStart >= {TimeRange:start} and ChargePeriodStart <= {TimeRange:end}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ChargePeriodStart, Model, Direction, FoundryResource;
CostData
| where FoundryResource == "{SelectedFoundryAccount}"
| summarize Cost = round(sum(BilledCost), 4) by Project, Model
| render barchart
content.title: Cost by Project & Model

content.query:
let CostData = AICostData_CL
| where isnotempty(FoundryResource)
| where ChargePeriodStart >= {TimeRange:start} and ChargePeriodStart <= {TimeRange:end}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ChargePeriodStart, Model, Direction, FoundryResource;
CostData
| where FoundryResource == "{SelectedFoundryAccount}"
| summarize Tokens = round(sum(ConsumedQuantity) / 1000, 1) by Project, Model
| render barchart
content.title: Tokens (K) by Project & Model

content.query:
let CostData = AICostData_CL
| where isnotempty(FoundryResource)
| where ChargePeriodStart >= {TimeRange:start} and ChargePeriodStart <= {TimeRange:end}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ChargePeriodStart, Model, Direction, FoundryResource;
CostData
| where FoundryResource == "{SelectedFoundryAccount}"
| summarize
    TotalCost = round(sum(BilledCost), 4),
    TotalTokens = round(sum(ConsumedQuantity), 0)
  by Project, Model
| extend TokensK = round((TotalTokens * 1.0) / 1000, 1)
| project Project, Model, TotalCost, TokensK
| order by Project asc, TotalCost desc
content.title: Model Breakdown per Project in {SelectedFoundryAccount}

content.json:
---
## 📊 Interaction Analytics
> **Value:** Operational baseline for capacity planning and SLA tracking. Shows what a typical interaction looks like (latency, cost, tokens) and where reliability problems exist.
>
> Answers: “Are we getting throttled?” “What is our P95 latency?” “What does each request cost?”
>
> Source: AzureDiagnostics — per-request completion logs from Cognitive Services

content.title: Interaction Profile â€” Use These for Forecasting â¬‡

content.query:
let CostData = AICostData_CL | where ChargePeriodStart >= {TimeRange:start} and ChargePeriodStart <= {TimeRange:end} | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ChargePeriodStart, Model, Direction, FoundryResource, Project;
let totalReqs = toscalar(AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES' and Category == 'RequestResponse' | where OperationName in ('Completions_Create','create_completions','create_response') | summarize count());
let allTokens = toscalar(CostData | summarize sum(ConsumedQuantity));
CostData
| summarize InputTokens = sumif(ConsumedQuantity, Direction == 'Input'), OutputTokens = sumif(ConsumedQuantity, Direction == 'Output'), TotalCost = sum(BilledCost), MinDay = min(ChargePeriodStart), MaxDay = max(ChargePeriodStart) by Model
| extend TotalTokens = InputTokens + OutputTokens
| extend DaySpan = max_of(datetime_diff('day', MaxDay, MinDay) + 1, 1)
| extend TokenShare = iff(allTokens > 0, TotalTokens / allTokens, 0.0)
| extend EstReqs = round(totalReqs * TokenShare, 0)
| project Model,
    ['Est. Interactions'] = tolong(EstReqs),
    ['Avg Tokens/Req'] = iff(EstReqs > 0, round(TotalTokens / EstReqs, 0), 0.0),
    ['Avg Prompt'] = iff(EstReqs > 0, round(InputTokens / EstReqs, 0), 0.0),
    ['Avg Completion'] = iff(EstReqs > 0, round(OutputTokens / EstReqs, 0), 0.0),
    ['Input Ratio'] = iff(TotalTokens > 0, round(InputTokens / TotalTokens, 2), 0.0),
    ['Daily Avg Reqs'] = iff(EstReqs > 0, round(EstReqs / (DaySpan * 1.0), 1), 0.0),
    ['Total Cost ($)'] = round(TotalCost, 4)
| order by ['Est. Interactions'] desc
content.title: Interaction Profile per Model

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES' and Category == 'RequestResponse'
| where OperationName in ('Completions_Create','create_completions','create_response')
| summarize Requests = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Interactions Over Time

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES' and Category == 'RequestResponse'
| where OperationName in ('Completions_Create','create_completions','create_response')
| extend LatencyMs = todecimal(DurationMs)
| extend LatencyBucket = case(
    LatencyMs < 500, '<500ms',
    LatencyMs < 1000, '500ms-1s',
    LatencyMs < 3000, '1-3s',
    LatencyMs < 10000, '3-10s',
    '>10s')
| summarize Count = count() by LatencyBucket
| order by LatencyBucket asc
| render piechart
content.title: Latency Distribution

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES' and Category == 'RequestResponse'
| summarize
    Total = count(),
    Success = countif(ResultSignature == '200'),
    Throttled = countif(ResultSignature == '429'),
    Errors = countif(ResultSignature !in ('200','429') and isnotempty(ResultSignature))
  by OperationName
| extend SuccessRate = iff(Total > 0, round((Success * 1.0) * 100 / (Total * 1.0), 1), 0.0)
| project Operation = OperationName, Total, Success, Throttled, Errors, ['Success Rate %'] = SuccessRate
| order by Total desc
content.title: Request Reliability by Operation

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES' and Category == 'RequestResponse'
| where OperationName in ('Completions_Create','create_completions','create_response')
| extend LatencyMs = todecimal(DurationMs)
| summarize AvgLatency = round(avg(LatencyMs), 0), P95 = round(percentile(LatencyMs, 95), 0) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Latency Over Time (Avg vs P95)

content.json:
### Interactions by Project
> **Value:** Per-project operational health — surfaces which project has throttling or error problems so you know where to add retries or request quota increases.
>
> Source: AzureDiagnostics — project extracted from ResourceId

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES' and Category == 'RequestResponse'
| where OperationName in ('Completions_Create','create_completions','create_response')
| extend FoundryResource = extract('/accounts/([^/]+)', 1, _ResourceId)
| extend Project = iff(_ResourceId has '/projects/', extract('/projects/([^/]+)', 1, _ResourceId), 'shared')
| extend LatencyMs = todecimal(DurationMs)
| summarize
    Requests = count(),
    AvgLatency = round(avg(LatencyMs), 0),
    P95Latency = round(percentile(LatencyMs, 95), 0),
    Throttled = countif(ResultSignature == '429'),
    Errors = countif(ResultSignature !in ('200','429') and isnotempty(ResultSignature))
  by FoundryResource, Project
| extend SuccessRate = iff(Requests > 0, round(((Requests - Throttled - Errors) * 100.0) / (Requests * 1.0), 1), 0.0)
| project ['Foundry Resource'] = FoundryResource,
    ['Project'] = Project,
    ['Requests'] = Requests,
    ['Avg Latency (ms)'] = AvgLatency,
    ['P95 Latency (ms)'] = P95Latency,
    ['Throttled'] = Throttled,
    ['Errors'] = Errors,
    ['Success %'] = SuccessRate
| order by ['Foundry Resource'] asc, Requests desc
content.title: Request Volume & Latency by Foundry Resource â†’ Project

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES' and Category == 'RequestResponse'
| where OperationName in ('Completions_Create','create_completions','create_response')
| extend Project = iff(_ResourceId has '/projects/', extract('/projects/([^/]+)', 1, _ResourceId), 'shared')
| summarize Requests = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Project
| render timechart
content.title: Interactions Over Time by Project

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES' and Category == 'RequestResponse'
| where OperationName in ('Completions_Create','create_completions','create_response')
| extend Project = iff(_ResourceId has '/projects/', extract('/projects/([^/]+)', 1, _ResourceId), 'shared')
| summarize Requests = count() by Project
| render piechart
content.title: Request Share by Project

content.json:
---
## 📡 Native Metrics by Project
> **Value:** Platform-reported token and request counts (independent of billing data). Cross-reference with cost data to validate completeness and detect metering discrepancies.
>
> Answers: “Do platform metrics match what we are billed?” “Is token usage trending up in real-time?”
>
> Source: AzureMetrics — requires Diagnostic Settings with AllMetrics enabled on Foundry accounts.

content.query:
let ProjectMap = AICostData_CL
| where isnotempty(FoundryResource) and isnotempty(Project) and Project != 'unknown' and Project != 'no-project'
| summarize Project = take_any(Project) by FoundryResource;
AzureMetrics
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES'
| where MetricName in ('TokenTransaction', 'ProcessedPromptTokens', 'GeneratedTokens')
| extend Resource = extract('/accounts/([^/]+)', 1, _ResourceId)
| where Resource == "{SelectedFoundryAccount}"
| extend ProjectFromId = iff(_ResourceId has '/projects/', extract('/projects/([^/]+)', 1, _ResourceId), '')
| join kind=leftouter (ProjectMap) on $left.Resource == $right.FoundryResource
| extend ResolvedProject = iff(isnotempty(ProjectFromId), ProjectFromId, iff(isnotempty(Project1), Project1, 'account-level'))
| summarize Tokens = sum(Total) by Resource, ResolvedProject, MetricName
| extend Metric = case(
    MetricName == 'TokenTransaction', 'Total Tokens',
    MetricName == 'ProcessedPromptTokens', 'Input Tokens',
    MetricName == 'GeneratedTokens', 'Output Tokens',
    MetricName)
| project Resource, Project = ResolvedProject, Metric, Tokens
| order by Resource asc, Project asc, Metric asc
content.title: Token Metrics in {SelectedFoundryAccount}

content.query:
let ProjectMap = AICostData_CL
| where isnotempty(FoundryResource) and isnotempty(Project) and Project != 'unknown' and Project != 'no-project'
| summarize Project = take_any(Project) by FoundryResource;
AzureMetrics
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES'
| where MetricName in ('TokenTransaction', 'ProcessedPromptTokens', 'GeneratedTokens')
| extend Resource = extract('/accounts/([^/]+)', 1, _ResourceId)
| where Resource == "{SelectedFoundryAccount}"
| extend ProjectFromId = iff(_ResourceId has '/projects/', extract('/projects/([^/]+)', 1, _ResourceId), '')
| join kind=leftouter (ProjectMap) on $left.Resource == $right.FoundryResource
| extend ResolvedProject = iff(isnotempty(ProjectFromId), ProjectFromId, iff(isnotempty(Project1), Project1, 'account-level'))
| summarize Tokens = sum(Total) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), ResolvedProject, MetricName
| where MetricName == 'TokenTransaction'
| project TimeGenerated, Project = ResolvedProject, Tokens
| render timechart
content.title: Total Tokens Over Time in {SelectedFoundryAccount}

content.query:
let ProjectMap = AICostData_CL
| where isnotempty(FoundryResource) and isnotempty(Project) and Project != 'unknown' and Project != 'no-project'
| summarize Project = take_any(Project) by FoundryResource;
AzureMetrics
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES'
| where MetricName in ('AzureOpenAIRequests', 'TotalCalls')
| extend Resource = extract('/accounts/([^/]+)', 1, _ResourceId)
| where Resource == "{SelectedFoundryAccount}"
| extend ProjectFromId = iff(_ResourceId has '/projects/', extract('/projects/([^/]+)', 1, _ResourceId), '')
| join kind=leftouter (ProjectMap) on $left.Resource == $right.FoundryResource
| extend ResolvedProject = iff(isnotempty(ProjectFromId), ProjectFromId, iff(isnotempty(Project1), Project1, 'account-level'))
| summarize Requests = sum(Total) by Resource, ResolvedProject
| project Resource, Project = ResolvedProject, Requests
| order by Resource asc, Requests desc
content.title: Request Count in {SelectedFoundryAccount}

content.query:
let ProjectMap = AICostData_CL
| where isnotempty(FoundryResource) and isnotempty(Project) and Project != 'unknown' and Project != 'no-project'
| summarize Project = take_any(Project) by FoundryResource;
AzureMetrics
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES'
| where MetricName in ('AzureOpenAIRequests', 'TotalCalls')
| extend Resource = extract('/accounts/([^/]+)', 1, _ResourceId)
| where Resource == "{SelectedFoundryAccount}"
| extend ProjectFromId = iff(_ResourceId has '/projects/', extract('/projects/([^/]+)', 1, _ResourceId), '')
| join kind=leftouter (ProjectMap) on $left.Resource == $right.FoundryResource
| extend ResolvedProject = iff(isnotempty(ProjectFromId), ProjectFromId, iff(isnotempty(Project1), Project1, 'account-level'))
| summarize Requests = sum(Total) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), ResolvedProject
| project TimeGenerated, Project = ResolvedProject, Requests
| render timechart
content.title: Requests Over Time in {SelectedFoundryAccount}

content.json:
---
## 📈 Cost Trends & Growth
> **Value:** Month-over-month trajectory for budget planning and executive reporting. Reveals whether spending is accelerating, stable, or declining.
>
> Answers: “Is spending growing?” “Did last month’s optimization actually reduce cost?”
>
> Source: AICostData_CL — monthly aggregation with growth percentage

content.query:
let CostData = AICostData_CL | where ChargePeriodStart >= {TimeRange:start} and ChargePeriodStart <= {TimeRange:end} | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ChargePeriodStart, Model, Direction, FoundryResource, Project;
CostData
| extend PeriodDt = case('{Granularity}' == 'Daily', startofday(ChargePeriodStart), startofmonth(ChargePeriodStart))
| summarize Cost = round(sum(BilledCost), 4) by PeriodDt, Model
| extend Period = case('{Granularity}' == 'Daily', format_datetime(PeriodDt, 'yyyy-MM-dd'), strcat(case(monthofyear(PeriodDt)==1,'Jan',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==2,'Feb',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==3,'Mar',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==4,'Apr',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==5,'May',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==6,'Jun',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==7,'Jul',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==8,'Aug',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==9,'Sep',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==10,'Oct',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==11,'Nov','Dec'), ' ', format_datetime(PeriodDt, 'yyyy')))
| project Period, Cost, Model
| order by Period asc
| render barchart
content.title: {Granularity} Cost Trend by Model

content.query:
let CostData = AICostData_CL | where ChargePeriodStart >= {TimeRange:start} and ChargePeriodStart <= {TimeRange:end} | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ChargePeriodStart, Model, Direction, FoundryResource, Project;
CostData
| extend PeriodDt = case('{Granularity}' == 'Daily', startofday(ChargePeriodStart), startofmonth(ChargePeriodStart))
| summarize Tokens = round(sum(ConsumedQuantity), 0) by PeriodDt, Model
| extend Period = case('{Granularity}' == 'Daily', format_datetime(PeriodDt, 'yyyy-MM-dd'), strcat(case(monthofyear(PeriodDt)==1,'Jan',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==2,'Feb',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==3,'Mar',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==4,'Apr',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==5,'May',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==6,'Jun',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==7,'Jul',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==8,'Aug',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==9,'Sep',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==10,'Oct',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==11,'Nov','Dec'), ' ', format_datetime(PeriodDt, 'yyyy')))
| project Period, Tokens, Model
| order by Period asc
| render barchart
content.title: {Granularity} Token Trend by Model

content.query:
let CostData = AICostData_CL | where ChargePeriodStart >= {TimeRange:start} and ChargePeriodStart <= {TimeRange:end} | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ChargePeriodStart, Model, Direction, FoundryResource, Project;
CostData
| extend PeriodDt = case('{Granularity}' == 'Daily', startofday(ChargePeriodStart), startofmonth(ChargePeriodStart))
| summarize Cost = round(sum(BilledCost), 4) by PeriodDt, Model
| extend Period = case('{Granularity}' == 'Daily', format_datetime(PeriodDt, 'yyyy-MM-dd'), strcat(case(monthofyear(PeriodDt)==1,'Jan',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==2,'Feb',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==3,'Mar',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==4,'Apr',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==5,'May',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==6,'Jun',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==7,'Jul',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==8,'Aug',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==9,'Sep',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==10,'Oct',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==11,'Nov','Dec'), ' ', format_datetime(PeriodDt, 'yyyy')))
| project Period, Model, Cost
| order by Period asc, Model asc
content.title: {Granularity} Cost by Model

content.query:
let CostData = AICostData_CL | where ChargePeriodStart >= {TimeRange:start} and ChargePeriodStart <= {TimeRange:end} | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ChargePeriodStart, Model, Direction, FoundryResource, Project;
CostData
| extend PeriodDt = case('{Granularity}' == 'Daily', startofday(ChargePeriodStart), startofmonth(ChargePeriodStart))
| summarize Cost = round(sum(BilledCost), 4) by PeriodDt
| order by PeriodDt asc
| extend PrevCost = prev(Cost)
| extend ['Growth %'] = iff(isnotnull(PrevCost) and PrevCost > 0, round((Cost - PrevCost) * 100.0 / PrevCost, 1), real(null))
| extend Period = case('{Granularity}' == 'Daily', format_datetime(PeriodDt, 'yyyy-MM-dd'), strcat(case(monthofyear(PeriodDt)==1,'Jan',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==2,'Feb',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==3,'Mar',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==4,'Apr',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==5,'May',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==6,'Jun',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==7,'Jul',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==8,'Aug',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==9,'Sep',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==10,'Oct',monthofyear(PeriodDt)==11,'Nov','Dec'), ' ', format_datetime(PeriodDt, 'yyyy')))
| project Period, ['Cost ($)'] = Cost, ['Growth %']
content.title: {Granularity} Cost Growth

content.json:
---
## Cost Forecast Simulator
> **Sources: Both** — baseline tokens from `AICostData_CL`, interaction counts from `AzureDiagnostics`, projected costs use published model pricing rates.
>
> Select a model to see its specific token ratio used in projections. Adjust scenario parameters to model user growth.

parameters.name: ForecastModel
parameters.label: Forecast Model
parameters.query:
AICostData_CL
| where ChargePeriodStart >= {TimeRange:start} and ChargePeriodStart <= {TimeRange:end}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ChargePeriodStart, Model, Direction
| summarize TotalCost = sum(BilledCost) by Model
| order by TotalCost desc
| project value=Model, label=Model

content.title: Selected Model Baseline ({ForecastModel})

---
### ðŸ“Œ Data Source Reference
| Section | Source Table | What It Shows |
|---|---|---|
| Overview KPIs | `AICostData_CL` + `AzureDiagnostics` | Total cost, tokens, requests, avg tokens/interaction |
| Cost per Model | `AICostData_CL` | Actual billed USD from Azure Cost Management |
| Foundry Resource â†’ Project | `AICostData_CL` | Cost & tokens by Foundry resource, drill-down by project |
| Token Usage per Model | `AICostData_CL` + pricing lookup | Tokens derived from billing (Cost Ã· unit price) |
| Interaction Analytics | `AzureDiagnostics` | Request counts, latency, success rates, throttling |
| Cost Trends | `AICostData_CL` | MoM growth, daily trends |
| Forecast | Parameter-driven KQL | Scenario modelling with published pricing |

**No App Insights or APIM required.** Only needs:
1. Diagnostic settings on Cognitive Services â†’ Log Analytics (RequestResponse logs)
2. Cost ingestion script (`ingest-cost-data.ps1`) populating `AICostData_CL`

### PayGo Pricing Reference (per 1M tokens)
| Model | Input | Output | Cached Input |

| GPT-4.1 | $2.00 | $8.00 | $0.50 |
| GPT-4o (2024-08-06) | $2.50 | $10.00 | $1.25 |
| GPT-4o-mini | $0.15 | $0.60 | $0.075 |
